title: Happy Birthday, Samar! 🎂
message: Wishing our Web Admin a fantastic birthday. The house celebrates you today!

title: Hackathon 2025 — Registrations Open
message: The Sundarbans House annual hackathon is here. Register before April 30th. Teams of 2–4 members.

title: Mannu Yadav — 1st Place at IIT Bombay Techfest
message: Our Secretary brought home gold! Congratulations on representing Sundarbans House brilliantly.

title: Term 2 Quiz Schedule Released
message: The quiz schedule for Term 2 is now live on the portal. Check your dates and plan accordingly.

title: Community Meetup — Bangalore, May 10
message: In-person meetup for Bangalore members at Koramangala Social. RSVP by May 5th.

title: Happy Birthday, Aditya Vaidhya! 🎂
message: Sending love to our Deputy Secretary on his special day. You make this house proud!
